WaysERP

Create Organisation Account

Admin approval required before first login

Organisation
FIRS Details
Account

Organisation Details

Full legal name of your company as registered with the Corporate Affairs Commission (CAC)

A unique slug that identifies your organisation on the platform — e.g. acme.ng. Cannot be changed after registration.

Country where your business is primarily registered and operates

Business contact number in international format — e.g. +2348012345678

Full street address of your business including building number, street name, and city

Nigerian postal code for your business location — e.g. 100001 for Lagos Island

Summarise your company's main activities — e.g. "Import and distribution of industrial equipment across Nigeria". Minimum 10 characters.

Already have an account? Sign in
